info.title: Static Import Tool
info.description: `static-import` is a dotnet cli tool to migrate file(s) from another project, github or public website.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Migrate file(s) from another project, github or public website

options.name: -i
options.description:
Input file paths or urls (https://... or github:user@repo/<REF>/path/to/file.ext)
If environment variable `GH_TOKEN` or `GITHUB_TOKEN` is defined, it is used to access to GitHub

options.name: -o
options.description:
Output folder or file path
Current folder is used if omitted

options.name: -op
options.description: Output file prefix used when output path is set to folder

options.name: -f
options.description:
Overwrite file without confirmation
Note that output file will be overwritten even if it is newer than input file

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
[C#] Change namespace
If name is ending with '.', it will be prepended
